candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Production costs
candidates.why: Explicit D&A line within the Production Costs / COGS component breakdown, appearing as a sub-component under the selected COGS bucket rather than a separate same-level operating line. This indicates it is already embedded in the selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS', so it should not be added separately.

Generic operating depreciation line shown later in the statement, not clearly tied specifically to COGS and likely part of broader operating D&A disclosures. Using it for COGS would risk double counting versus the explicit production-cost D&A component.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-related amortization, not a clear COGS-wide D&A add-back candidate relative to the selected COGS parent row. The statement already shows a dedicated R&D row in production costs, so adding this separately to COGS would be unsafe.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. The explicit row 'Depreciation and Amortization in Production costs' appears to be a nested component of Production Costs/COGS, so D&A is already embedded in the selected parent bucket and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Administrative costs
candidates.why: Explicit D&A line within the Administrative costs breakdown. Because the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is the parent row 'Administrative costs', this D&A appears already included in that selected row and should not be added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortization in Sales and distribution costs
candidates.why: This D&A belongs to Sales costs, but the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket is only 'Administrative costs'. It is outside the chosen reference bucket and therefore should not be added to XSGA_DA.

candidates.row_label: Amortization excluding Goodwill in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: R&D-specific amortization disclosure. A separate above-operating-profit R&D row already exists and was selected in XRD as 'Research and Development in Production Costs', so this should not be added to XSGA_DA under the special R&D interaction rule.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Generic operating amortization detail later in the statement, not clearly mapped to the selected Administrative costs bucket. Adding it to SG&A would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and impairment of property, plant and equipment and lease assets
Amortisation and impairment of intangible assets

variables.notes: MANUALLY SELECTED. XSGA_COMPONENTS reference bucket is 'Administrative costs'. The explicit administrative D&A row is a sub-component of that parent and therefore already embedded. Sales/distribution D&A is outside the selected bucket, and R&D amortization should not be added because a separate R&D expense row is already visible and handled through XRD.
